---
title: "Bell & Associates"
subtitle: "We know the box"
title-block-banner: images/banner.jpg
format:
    html:
        toc: false
---

# Project administrative boundaries map

This map highlights the administrative jurisdictions covered by past projects
that Bell & Associates were involved in.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import folium
import osmnx as ox
import pandas as pd

states = pd.read_csv("assets/states.csv")
df = pd.read_csv("assets/map_data.csv")
df = df.drop_duplicates(subset=["Street", "City"])
m = folium.Map(location=[40,-108], zoom_start=3)

for _, row in df.iterrows():
    state = states.set_index("Abbreviation").at[row["State"], "State"]
    searchstring = f"{row['City']} {state}"
    place = f"{row['City']}, {row['State']}"
    url = f"projects/{row['City'].lower().replace(' ','_').replace('.','')}_{row['State']}.html"
    try:
        gdf = ox.geocode_to_gdf(searchstring)
        poly = gdf.geometry.iloc[0]
        center = [poly.centroid.y, poly.centroid.x]
        folium.GeoJson(
            data=poly.__geo_interface__,
            tooltip=place,
            style_function=lambda x: {
                "color": "red",
                "weight": 3,
                "fillOpacity": 0.4,
                "stroke": False
            }
        ).add_to(m)
    except TypeError:
        gdf = ox.geocode(searchstring)
    folium.Marker(
        center,
        tooltip=place,
        color="red",
        popup=folium.Popup(
            f'<a href={url} target="_blank">{place}</a>',
            max_width=200
        )
    ).add_to(m)
#radius=3,
#fill=True,
#fill_opacity=1,
#stroke=False
m
```
